groups.title: General FAQs
groups.intro: Typical questions from growth-stage B2B teams.

items.question: How long does a typical engagement take?
items.answer: Most projects run between 6 and 12 weeks depending on implementation depth.

items.question: Do you work with existing tooling?
items.answer: Yes. We prioritize practical improvements within your current stack before recommending changes.

items.question: Can you support internal enablement?
items.answer: Yes. We document workflows and train internal owners as part of implementation.
